"9. 3179 strs14 T4*111 f*z11 T{ 41,4 6451-1. -874 t74 7 *7 WW 41rr1T1 *it ddir tcri A tem ailir*-614 *Tr TrIvi * -Rta 7mirt 3/4* -A Vat ,31Mtbni-r 41r A arqk sicrr 4951-1 51(1Ni1Th9* *Wm crkt 4619 gro Aff .11Ria t 3fr f7A5 qfk kr cram 11 Rft * 1LM t t 4c4Inkld i4a1* qirrifcra, *I* aireiR TR 45114 d`4511 *317 ktf *Tcf-Th-7*alfz4A, -zIR t, far-R14* fir-NLi 8 -4:1 4.gcf 041 'MT 37 *4-A*15114:if qiik11171 341TT fitiffra *k 44411^1**(fr 05[41141 -W1*z( *1- 11 '3110 I" ktO* Zcila,ztr-v-at f9krw [el*1317111/4/139-0./10/3143] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—Sac. 4] SMALL INDUSTRIES DEVELOPMENT BANK OF INDIA NOTIFICATION Lucknow, the 18th October, 2010 Small Industries Development Bank of India (Payment of Gratuity to Employees) (Amendment) Regulations, 2010 F. No. IIRDD No. 2676/ Staff Gem (2).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of Section 52 of the Small Industries Development Bank of IndiaAct, 1989. (39 of 1989), the Board of Directors ofthe Small Industries Development Bank of Indiahereby makes the following amendments to the Small Industries Development Bank of India (Payment of Gratuity to Employees) Regulations, 2002, namely:- These regulations may be called the Small Industries Development Bank of India (Payinent of Gratuity to Employees) (Amendment) Regulations, 2010. They shall come into force with effect from May 24, 2010. Sub-Regulations (1)(a) & (b) of Regulation 6 of the Small Industries Development Bank of India (Payment of Gratuity to Employees) Regulations, 2002 (hereinafter referred to as Principal Regulations) shall be substituted with the following: "(1)(a) a sum equal to one month's pay plus dearness allowance for each completed year of service or anticipated service in the Small Industries Bank or part thereof in excess of 6 months, subject to a maximum of 20 months' pay plus dearness allowance or Rs. 9,00,000, whichever is less, for first 20 years of service." "(1)(b) an additional sum equal to half month's pay plus dearness allowance for each completed year of service or anticipated service in the Small Industries Bank or part thereof in excess of 6 months for service or anticipated service in excess of 20 years." Sub-Regulation (2) of Regulation 6 oldie Principal Regulations shall be substituted with the following: "(2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-regulation 6(1), an employee shall be entitled for Payment of Gratuity as per the Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972, in ease hi s entitlement thereunder is more than that of under Regulation 6(1 )." Regulation 9 of the Principal Regulations shall be substituted with the following: "9.Tax to be borne by the employee on the gratuity granted shall be restricted to lax on that portion of the taxable gratuity as is equivalent to thedifference between the amount of Small Industries Bank's revised ceiling and the amount ofthe Small Industries Bank's previous ceiling as divided by the total gratuity granted and the balance of the tax shall be borne by the Small Industries Bank. Provided flintier that in case of an employee who aim while in service, income tax and super tax, if any, payable on the difference in the amount of gratuity admissible on the basis of actual service and anticipated service shall he borne by the prisons referred to in Regulation 8 of these Regulations in such a manner as may he decided by the Small Industries Bank and shall be deducted from the amount of gratuity payable to such prisons." RAICESH REWAR1, Dy. Managing Director [ADVT III14/139 0/ExtYi Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delld-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
